title: Senior Teacher - Career Launcher - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Career Launcher - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the Career Launcher family as a Senior Teacher in Noida. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Career Launcher:
Career Launcher is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Career Launcher!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
